Senior Cloud Engineer
TechNova Inc — Seattle, WA (Hybrid)

About the role

TechNova is looking for a Senior Cloud Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team. You will design and operate our AWS-based infrastructure, improve our CI/CD pipelines, and help migrate our remaining on-premises workloads to the cloud. You will work closely with product engineering teams and report to the VP of Engineering.

Responsibilities

- Design and maintain AWS infrastructure using Terraform and CloudFormation
- Manage and scale our EKS-based Kubernetes platform
- Build and improve CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions
- Define and enforce security and compliance controls (IAM, RBAC, SOC 2 alignment)
- Monitor system health using CloudWatch, Prometheus, and Grafana
- Lead cloud cost optimisation initiatives
- Mentor junior engineers and contribute to team standards and documentation
- Participate in on-call rotation and incident response

Requirements

- 5+ years of cloud engineering experience, primarily on AWS
- Strong Kubernetes administration skills (EKS preferred)
- Proficiency with Terraform for infrastructure as code
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or similar)
- Solid understanding of networking (VPCs, subnets, security groups, transit gateways)
- Experience with observability tooling (CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, or Datadog)
- Familiarity with security frameworks and SOC 2 compliance requirements
- Strong communication skills; comfortable working with senior stakeholders

Nice to have

- AWS certifications (Solutions Architect Professional or DevOps Engineer Professional)
- Experience with multi-account AWS organisations and landing zones
- Exposure to FinOps practices and cloud cost management
- Prior experience in financial services or regulated environments

Salary: $160,000 – $190,000 + equity
